ROAS segments correct  — Best/Better/OK/Bad/Worst rules applied per spreadsheet
Stage column  — accordion/dropdown UI; "View Stage Details ▼" per row; expands 4 blocks: Last 30 Days, Before Last, Last 60 Days, Last 90 Days

Notes & Data Rules

  • Primary source: public.ppc_etl_performance_data — daily-grain Google Ads data. Filter: record_type = 'campaign' AND source = 3.
  • Campaign inclusion rule: campaign_name ILIKE '%Sonya%' (7 campaigns) PLUS campaign ID 20810136438 (Pmax UK | Muguntha | Shoptimised | GB | DM 46 All | MCV | UK) confirmed by Sonya as part of her group. Total: 9 campaigns. Other Muguntha campaigns are excluded.
  • English_EU campaign (23914872425): Name resolved from staging_ai.pmax_18m_postmortem_fact_v1 — not yet in truth registry. Confirmed in ppc_etl_performance_data with L30 cost £253.88.
  • Last 30 Days (main table): date >= '2026-06-08' AND date <= '2026-07-07'.
  • Stage accordion: "View Stage Details ▼" button per row — click to expand/collapse independently. Shows 4 blocks: (1) Last 30 Days 2026-06-08–2026-07-07, (2) Before Last 2026-05-09–2026-06-07, (3) Last 60 Days 2026-05-09–2026-07-07, (4) Last 90 Days 2026-04-09–2026-07-07. Each block: Cost, ROAS, Conversions, Conversion Value.
  • ROAS: (SUM(sales) / SUM(spend)) × 100. Segments — Best ≥400%, Better 350–399%, OK 300–349%, Bad 200–299%, Worst <200%.
  • Days: COUNT(DISTINCT date) with spend data in the last 30-day window.
  • Budget: Not available in ppc_etl_performance_data — shown as N/A.
  • Campaign 23793722836 (D Gen Pendant Light): No activity in last 30d. Before Last shows £19.98 spend for 4 days.
  • Previous sources removed: cppc_workbook_campaign_performance_v1, cppc_pmax_campaign_grain_action_queue_v1, cppc_pmax_campaign_passport_v1, pmax_18m_postmortem_fact_v1 — no longer used for Requirement 1.
  • Active Campaign filter: ppc_etl_performance_data has no status/enabled/campaign_state column (18 columns, performance metrics only). Active = campaign has cost > 0 in last 30 days. 8/9 campaigns qualify (D Gen / 23793722836 has £0 spend in L30).
  • Push Campaign filter: ppc_etl_performance_data has no push/campaign_type/label column. Push = campaign name contains 'push' (case-insensitive). 0/9 current campaigns match — filter returns empty set by design until push campaigns are added to Sonya's group.

Requirement 4 · Google Ads · Opportunity Tab · Last 30 Days

Opportunity SKUs Dashboard

Staff: Sonya  ·  Platform: Google Ads (UK)  ·  Period: Last 30 Days (2026-06-09 – 2026-07-08)  ·  Source: public.order_transaction + ppc_etl_performance_data + listing_data + inv_final_stock
Business Rule: >2 combined non-Google sales in L30 Platforms: Amazon · eBay · B&Q · Shopify · Manual Orders Temu: Not in DB — Data Missing Showing top 300 of 2,265 Opportunity SKUs
Data sources: Marketplace sales — public.order_transaction (source_name IN: AMAZON, EBAY, B&Q, SHOPIFY, MANUAL OM, MANUALORDER; 2026-06-09–2026-07-08; excluding Canceled/Refunded/Deleted). Google Ads metrics — public.ppc_etl_performance_data (record_type=product, source=3, 2026-06-09–2026-07-08). Shopify listing data — public.listing_data (which_channel_name=shopify; join: ppc.ref_id = listing.ref_id). Stock — public.inv_final_stock (SUM per SKU).
Opportunity rule: Combined non-Google sales > 2 units in last 30 days = Opportunity List. Temu: Not found in order_transaction — documented as Data Missing. Product URL: shopify_handle NULL in listing_data — links unavailable. Keywords: No marketplace keyword source identified — shown as Data Missing.

Validation — Requirement 4 (2026-07-09)

Opportunity rule — combined non-Google sales > 2 in L30 → Stage = Opportunity List
Platforms covered — Amazon, eBay, B&Q, Shopify, Manual OM, MANUALORDER
Total Opportunity SKUs — 2,265 confirmed from order_transaction
Google Ads metrics — ppc_etl_performance_data, record_type=product, source=3
Stock source — inv_final_stock; 2,121 in-stock opportunities
Image source — listing_data.main_image_url (CDN Shopify URLs confirmed)
Segment logic — proposed: Green/Monitor Cut/Zombie/Data Missing (not permanent rule)
Filters — Search, Segment, Stage, Platform, Stock all functional
KPI cards — 5 cards: Total, Combined Sales, In-Stock, Zero-Conv, Missing Ads
No PostgreSQL writes — read-only queries only
Temu — not found in order_transaction source_names; documented as Data Missing
Product URL — shopify_handle NULL in all listing_data rows; cannot build URLs
Marketplace keywords — no keyword source identified; shown as "Data Missing"
Display limit — top 300 SKUs by combined sales shown; full 2,265 available in PostgreSQL
Missing Shopify listing — 319 of 2,265 SKUs have no Shopify listing_data match

Notes & Data Rules — Requirement 4

  • Opportunity rule: SKU has combined non-Google platform sales > 2 units in last 30 days (2026-06-09 to 2026-07-08).
  • Platforms included: Amazon (AMAZON), eBay (EBAY), B&Q (B&Q), Shopify (SHOPIFY), Manual Orders (MANUAL OM + MANUALORDER). Temu not found in order_transaction — Data Missing.
  • Segment logic (proposed, not permanent business rule): Green = stock > 0 AND combined > 2 AND ROAS > 0. Monitor Cut = stock > 0 AND combined > 2 AND impressions > 0 AND conversions = 0. Zombie = stock > 0 AND combined > 2 AND impressions = 0 (no Google Ads visibility). Data Missing = no listing_data match OR no stock data.
  • Google Ads join: ppc_etl_performance_data.ref_id → listing_data.ref_id (which_channel_name=shopify) → listing_data.sku → order_transaction.sku.
  • Missing Ads: 1,074 of 2,265 opportunity SKUs have no matching Google Ads data in the L30 window.
  • Missing Shopify listing: 319 of 2,265 SKUs not found in listing_data (shopify channel). These show empty image/title/price.
  • Keywords: No marketplace keyword source identified in PostgreSQL. All rows show "Data Missing".
  • Product URL: shopify_handle column is NULL across all listing_data rows — product page URLs cannot be derived.
  • Display: Top 300 SKUs by combined_sales shown (pagination by 50). Total 2,265 opportunity SKUs confirmed in DB.
  • Date range: 2026-06-09 to 2026-07-08 (last 30 days relative to DB max date 2026-07-09).
